Rafael Maplevale is the founder of Glintworks Co. Rafael flagged churn as the top risk in the latest update.

turns.text: Partner meeting wrapped on the Glintworks Co round.
We decided to wait on the Glintworks Co round. We want next quarter's numbers first. Logging it now.
